researchResults.title: Yann LeCun’s AMI Labs raises $1.03 billion to build world models
researchResults.description: AMI Labs, the new venture cofounded by Turing Prize winner Yann LeCun after he left Meta, has raised $1.03 billion at a $3.5 billion pre-money valuation.

researchResults.title: OpenAI and Google employees rush to Anthropic’s defense in DOD lawsuit
researchResults.description: More than 30 OpenAI and Google DeepMind employees signed onto a statement supporting Anthropic's lawsuit against the Defense Department after the agency labeled the AI firm a supply-chain risk, according to court filings.

researchResults.title: Anthropic launches code review tool to check flood of AI-generated code
researchResults.description: Anthropic launched Code Review in Claude Code, a multi-agent system that automatically analyzes AI-generated code, flags logic errors, and helps enterprise developers manage the growing volume of code produced with AI.

researchResults.title: OpenAI acquires Promptfoo to secure its AI agents
researchResults.description: This deal underscores how frontier labs are scrambling to prove their technology can be used safely in critical business operations.

researchResults.title: Anthropic sues Defense Department over supply-chain risk designation
researchResults.description: Anthropic filed suit against the Department of Defense on Monday after the agency labeled it a supply-chain risk. The complaint calls the DOD's actions "unprecedented and unlawful."

researchResults.title: NVIDIA Details New A.I. Chips and Autonomous Car Project With Mercedes
NVIDIA Unveils Faster AI Chips Sooner Than Expected
